title: linum platyphyllum subsp. guvensenii
intro: Linum platyphyllum subsp. guvensenii, also known as Turkish flax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Linum platyphyllum subsp. guvensenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
